'''barosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldness|oldness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-r-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldness|oldness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| barosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæresheth|bæresheth]] || [[word:bæreshej|bæreshej]] || [[word:bæreshesh|bæreshesh]] || [[word:bæreshe|bæreshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:baroroshoth|baroroshoth]] || [[word:baroroshoj|baroroshoj]] || [[word:baroroshosh|baroroshosh]] || [[word:barorosho|barorosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:baroshoth|baroshoth]] || [[word:baroshoj|baroshoj]] || [[word:baroshosh|baroshosh]] || [[word:barosho|barosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:barofshofth|barofshofth]] || [[word:barofshofj|barofshofj]] || [[word:barofshofsh|barofshofsh]] || [[word:barofshof|barofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:baroshotho|baroshotho]] || [[word:baroshojo|baroshojo]] || [[word:baroshosho|baroshosho]] || [[word:baroshoko|baroshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:baroshoth|baroshoth]] || [[word:baroshoj|baroshoj]] || [[word:baroshosh|baroshosh]] || [[word:barosho|barosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:baroshothol|baroshothol]] || [[word:baroshojol|baroshojol]] || [[word:baroshoshol|baroshoshol]] || [[word:baroshokol|baroshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:baroshoothotho|baroshoothotho]] || [[word:baroshoojojo|baroshoojojo]] || [[word:baroshooshosho|baroshooshosho]] || [[word:baroshooko|baroshooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:baroshothon|baroshothon]] || [[word:baroshojon|baroshojon]] || [[word:baroshoshon|baroshoshon]] || [[word:baroshokon|baroshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:baroshothooro|baroshothooro]] || [[word:baroshojooro|baroshojooro]] || [[word:baroshoshooro|baroshoshooro]] || [[word:baroshokooro|baroshokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|c579b50}}
